data.title: Walmart seeks supply chain help from Cropin's AI-powered platform
data.description: Cropin's tech joins other AI solutions that Walmart has recently adopted in a year when supply chain technology is in demand.

data.title: Shop Circle raises $60 million to accelerate U.S. AI B2B expansion
data.description: Shop Circle plans to scale its footprint in North America through targeted acquisitions and expanded go-to-market efforts. Its recent acquisition of Aiden—an AI-driven guided selling platform.

data.title: Lifetime Brands makes a strong push for more ecommerce
data.description: Lifetime Brands, Inc. is a global manufacturer of kitchenware, tableware, and other home products. The company markets its goods under recognized brands including Farberware, and KitchenAid.

data.title: Perplexity adds an agentic commerce partner for its push into ecommerce
data.description: The company is working with Firmly.ai as it tries to make Perplexity an ecommerce destination in addition to an AI-powered engine.

data.title: Chewy Autoship accounts for 80% of sales in Q4
data.description: Chewy ended its fiscal 2024 with 20.5 million active customers. That's 2.1% growth and the first time in eight quarters that Chewy had a year-over-year increase in active customers.
